children.heading: Jurisdiction of State regulators
children.label: a Jurisdiction of State regulators
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall affect the jurisdiction of the securities commissioner (or any agency or officer performing like functions) of any State over any security or any person insofar as it does not conflict with the provisions of this subchapter or the rules and regulations thereunder.
is registered or licensed as such in the State in which it maintains its principal office and place of business; and
is in compliance with the applicable books and records requirements of the State in which it maintains its principal office and place of business.

children.heading: Limitation on capital and bond requirements
children.label: c Limitation on capital and bond requirements

children.text: is registered or licensed as such in the State in which it maintains its principal office and place of business; and
is in compliance with the applicable net capital or bonding requirements of the State in which it maintains its principal office and place of business.
does not have a place of business located within the State; and
during the preceding 12-month period, has had fewer than 6 clients who are residents of that State.
